title: Fishing Village Slow Walk
description: Wander a small coastal fishing village at the pace locals actually live it — harbor mornings, haenyeo divers, stone-walled homes.
local_story: Fishing villages are where several strands of Jeju life intersect in practice: haenyeo diving, seafood-based food culture, and the stone walls that shelter homes from coastal wind.
source_note: This is MVP experience-card data connected to JEJU-KB. It is not a real commercial product listing.
